name: better-fullstack
description: Let your AI assistant scaffold and extend Better Fullstack projects through the official MCP server and focused skills.

interface.shortDescription: Scaffold and extend verified fullstack starters
interface.longDescription: Bring Better Fullstack into Codex with skills that plan valid stacks, scaffold projects through the official MCP server, and update existing generated projects with preview-first stack changes. Covers TypeScript, React Native, Rust, Python, Go, Java, Elixir, and .NET ecosystems.
defaultPrompt: Create a fullstack app with Next, Hono, Postgres, and Better Auth
Scaffold a Rust Axum API with SQLx and Sentry
Add generated CI and observability to this Better Fullstack project
